pr_title: fix: remove unused summary field, slim call-2/3 prefix
pr_description: Remove `DocumentDetails.summary` field — required by schema but never used downstream, wastes tokens Remove summary validation section from system prompt Add "at least 15 words with an action verb" to section 6 (option structure) for uniform enforcement across all calls Slim call-2/3 prefix: remove duplicate quality/anti-fabrication reminders that are already in the system prompt
